name: Donald Trump
summary: Day 67. TRUMP REJECTED IRAN 14-POINT AS 'NOT ACCEPTABLE' MAY 4 (Truth Social: Iran has 'not yet paid a big enough price for what they have done to Humanity'); warned Iranian forces would be 'BLOWN OFF THE FACE OF THE EARTH' if they targeted US ships; on restart of strikes: 'I don't want to say that... if they misbehave... it's a possibility that could happen.' Asked whether US-Iran ceasefire still in effect — declined to confirm. US response to Iran's 14-point conveyed back via Pakistan; Iran reviewing. Same day Iran launched multi-axis kinetic restart — Trump confirmed Iran 'taken some shots' but 'caused little damage' (publicly minimized escalation). Project Freedom announced as ongoing US Navy operation: 2 destroyers transited Hormuz successfully, 6-7 Iranian fast boats sunk. The May 3 watching trigger 'US substantively engages on Iran proposal within 14 days' is RESOLVED-NO at Day 4 (rejected, not engaged). Markets re-priced: Brent +5.80% to $114.44; VIX +7.7% to 18.29; S&P -0.41% off May 1 record. The April 30 'extended-economic-warfare doctrine' under armed-naval-escort is now operationally institutionalized. New trigger watching: 'Trump issues fourth high-profile reversal' Day 5 of 30 — May 4 reversal from May 1-3 'reviewing' to 'not acceptable + kinetic-restart-allowed' qualifies as fourth.
